title: Neanotis calycina
intro: Neanotis calycina is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical Asia and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which can help in alleviating conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Bioactive constituents of Neanotis calycina include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
taxonomy: Neanotis calycina belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is a flowering plant species within the genus Neanotis. The classification of Neanotis calycina is a result of ongoing research in the field of botany.
